ddls:
CREATE TABLE "spells" (
  "spell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spell */,
  "spell_name" TEXT /* Name of the spell */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of spell (e.g., Offensive, Miscellaneous) */,
  "gp_cost" INTEGER /* Game points cost to cast the spell */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the spell */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the spell's effect */,
  "range" TEXT /* Range at which the spell can be cast */,
  "effect_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the spell's effect */,
  "cooldown_period" INTEGER /* Time required before the spell can be cast again */,
  "spell_icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the spell's icon image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the spell was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the spell's details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deities" (
  "deity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deity */,
  "deity_name" TEXT /* Name of the deity */,
  "alignment" TEXT /* Alignment of the deity (e.g., Good, Evil, Neutral) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the deity */,
  "symbol_url" TEXT /* URL to the deity's symbol image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the deity was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the deity's details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spell_deity" (
  "spell_deity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association */,
  "spell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spell */,
  "deity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the deity */,
  "effect_modifier" INTEGER /* Modifier that affects the spell's effectiveness when cast by a player who worships the associated deity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spell_deity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spell_deity_deity_id FOREIGN KEY ("deity_id") REFERENCES deities ("deity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spell_deity_spell_id FOREIGN KEY ("spell_id") REFERENCES spells ("spell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spell_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement */,
  "spell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spell with the requirement */,
  "requirement_type" TEXT /* Type of requirement (e.g., Equipment, Condition) */,
  "requirement_detail" TEXT /* Detail of the requirement */,
  "is_mandatory" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the requirement is mandatory for casting the spell */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the requirement was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the requirement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spell_requirements_spell_id FOREIGN KEY ("spell_id") REFERENCES spells ("spell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_spells" (
  "player_spell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the player's spell association */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "spell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spell */,
  "learned_date" TEXT /* Date when the player learned the spell */,
  "last_cast_date" TEXT /* The last date the player cast the spell */,
  "times_cast" INTEGER /* The number of times the player has cast the spell */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the player learned the spell */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the player's spell record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_spell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_spells_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_spells_spell_id FOREIGN KEY ("spell_id") REFERENCES spells ("spell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the player */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the player (e.g., Wizard, Priest) */,
  "deity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the deity the player worships */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the player account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the player's account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_deity_id FOREIGN KEY ("deity_id") REFERENCES deities ("deity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deity_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the deity relationship */,
  "deity_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first deity */,
  "deity_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second deity */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., Ally, Enemy) */,
  "relationship_strength" INTEGER /* Numeric value indicating the strength of the relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the relationship was established */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deity_relationships_deity_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("deity_id_2") REFERENCES deities ("deity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deity_relationships_deity_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("deity_id_1") REFERENCES deities ("deity_id")
)
